name: 2 x SatNet DTC test satellites
location_str: Launch Area 96A @ Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center, CHN
description: A pair of demonstration satellites for Direct-To-Cell (DTC) communications from Low Earth Orbit for SpaceSail and China Mobile:  * SpaceSail DTC 01  * CMCC-02
rocket_fact: Hypergolic fuels ignite spontaneously upon contact with each other, making them reliable for restarting engines in space.
